name: Perfios Indian Financial Data and Analytics REST API
what_it_does: Perfios Indian financial data and analytics REST API for banks, NBFCs, fintechs, and lending platforms to analyze bank statements, retrieve financial data through Account Aggregator (AA) framework, assess creditworthiness, and automate loan underwriting — enabling automated financial data extraction, income verification, cash flow analysis, and risk assessment through Perfios's AI-powered financial analytics platform serving 900+ financial institutions in India. Enables AI agents to manage bank statement analysis for income and cash flow verification automation, handle AA data for RBI Account Aggregator consent-based data automation, access credit assessment for loan underwriting risk scoring automation, retrieve GST analysis for business revenue verification automation, manage ITR analysis for income tax return verification automation, handle portfolio monitoring for loan performance tracking automation, access fraud detection for financial statement authenticity automation, retrieve FOIR calculation for fixed obligation income ratio automation, manage business analytics for SME financial health assessment automation, and integrate Perfios with core banking, lending management, and credit bureau systems for automated credit underwriting automation.
use_cases: Analyzing bank statements for income verification and cash flow assessment for lending automation agents
Accessing RBI Account Aggregator consented financial data for loan underwriting automation agents
Automating GST and ITR verification for small business loan credit assessment automation agents
Monitoring loan portfolio performance and early warning signals for NBFC risk management automation agents
not_for: Non-Indian markets (Perfios serves India-specific financial data and RBI regulatory framework)
Consumer-facing financial apps (Perfios is B2B financial analytics for lenders and institutions)
General accounting software (Perfios is financial data analytics, not bookkeeping or accounting)
best_when: An Indian bank, NBFC, fintech lender, or insurance company wanting AI agents to analyze bank statements, access AA-framework financial data, verify income and GST, and automate credit underwriting through Perfios's AI-powered financial analytics platform.
avoid_when: RBI ACCOUNT AGGREGATOR CONSENT REQUIRED: AA framework access requires customer consent through RBI-registered Account Aggregator; automated data access without consent assumption creates consent_not_granted; automated must implement AA consent flow before financial data access. PDPB AND RBI DATA COMPLIANCE: Perfios operates under India's PDPB and RBI data governance; automated non-compliant data handling assumption creates regulatory violation; automated must implement RBI-compliant data usage and retention. BANK STATEMENT FORMAT VARIABILITY: Indian banks have hundreds of statement formats; automated perfect parsing assumption creates parsing_error for unusual bank statement layouts; automated must handle Perfios parser confidence scores and fallback to manual review. AA FRAMEWORK REQUIRES FIP-FIU REGISTRATION: AA data access requires registration as Financial Information User (FIU) with RBI; automated non-registered AA access assumption creates FIU_registration_required; automated must complete RBI FIU registration before AA framework access.

auth.notes: Perfios uses API key + OAuth2 for financial analytics REST API. REST API with JSON. Bengaluru, India HQ. Founded 2008 by VR Govindarajan. Products: Bank statement analysis, AA data access, GST analytics, ITR verification, portfolio monitoring, fraud detection. SDKs: None public. 900+ financial institutions. RBI registered AA participant. Backed by Warburg Pincus, Bessemer, Avataar Ventures. Competes with Bureau, Karza, and Signzy for Indian fintech analytics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for approved financial institutions; production requires enterprise agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-analysis transaction fees; annual platform subscription; data volume-based pricing
pricing.notes: Bengaluru IN. Warburg Pincus/Bessemer. Per-analysis fees. 900+ FIs. RBI AA participant.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; bank statement analysis is computationally intensive; async processing supported

known_agent_gotchas: BANK STATEMENT ANALYSIS IS ASYNC: Perfios bank statement processing is computationally intensive and async; automated synchronous analysis assumption creates timeout for complex multi-page statements; automated must submit analysis job and poll for completion or use webhook notification

AA CONSENT FLOW IS MULTI-STEP: Account Aggregator consent requires customer authentication at AA app, FIP data fetch, and FIU delivery; automated single-step AA data assumption creates incomplete_consent_flow; automated must implement complete AA consent journey

PARSER CONFIDENCE SCORES: Perfios assigns confidence scores to parsed bank statement data; automated 100%-accuracy assumption creates downstream errors from low-confidence parsed data; automated must implement confidence threshold validation and flagging

GST PORTAL RATE LIMITS APPLY: GST verification hits government GST portal which has independent rate limits; automated unlimited GST verification assumption creates gst_portal_throttle; automated must implement queuing for high-volume GST verification requests

CATEGORY MAPPING IS CUSTOMIZABLE: Perfios transaction categorization can be customized per lender; automated default categories assumption creates misclassified transactions for institutions with custom category rules; automated must configure category mappings per institution's credit policy
agent_readiness.security_notes: Indian financial analytics. RBI, PDPB, IBA. API key + OAuth2. India. Bank statement, income, and financial profile data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Indian financial data. RBI, PDPB. API key + OAuth2. India. Bank statements and financial profile data.
